2605.29518.title: Network Optimization Aspects of Autonomous Vehicles: Challenges and Future Directions
2605.29518.paper_summary: Global megatrends, such as urbanization, population growth, and emerging network solutions are accelerating the development of the Connected and Autonomous Vehicles (CAVs) industry. There are many truths, some misconceptions, and even some excitement about CAVs in the public's opinion. The main objective of the current article is to provide a comprehensive review, eliminate misconceptions, and outline the future of the network optimization aspects of autonomous vehicles by presenting various multidisciplinary methods, such as cooperative perception. Given our extensive experience with CAVs, we are aiming to share some of the insights and knowledge we have gained, along with relevant use-cases and experiment results.
2605.29518.paper_summary_zh: 全球的巨型趨勢，例如城市化、人口增長和新興的網絡解決方案，正在加速連接與自動駕駛車輛（CAVs）行業的發展。公眾對CAVs的看法中有許多真相，也有一些誤解，甚至還有一些興奮。本文的主要目的是提供一個全面的回顧，消除誤解，並通過呈現各種多學科方法（如合作感知）來勾勒自動駕駛車輛的網絡優化未來。鑒於我們在CAVs方面的豐富經驗，我們旨在分享我們所獲得的一些見解和知識，以及相關的使用案例和實驗結果。
2605.29518.author: Rudolf Krecht et.al.
2605.29518.authors: Rudolf Krecht, Tamas Budai, Erno Horvath, Akos Kovacs, Nobert Marko, Miklos Unger
